---
title: "main-functions"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{main-functions}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(projectr)
```

```{r}
style_gt_journal(table, title, subtitle, percent)
# This function should apply consistent styling to gt tables used throughout the dashboard project. The styling should match the dashboard theme "journal by customizing table  formatting elements to create a polished and uniform appearance across all tables.
```

```{r}
plot_country_dist(data, country, order)
# This function should create a bar graph showing the distribution of plastic types collected within a selected country. The bars should be ordered according to the user’s selected sorting direction and styled consistently with the dashboard theme.
```

```{r}
summarize_plastics(data, group_var, summary_type)
# This function should summarize the plastics dataset by a selected grouping variable. The user should be able to choose whether the function calculates totals, proportions, or year-over-year changes, making it useful for multiple types of dashboard summaries.
```
